lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and body damage. The interior shows heavy wear and tear. The engine and transmission require major mechanical repairs to be functional.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The exterior shows significant wear, including several large dents, noticeable rust spots on the wheel wells, and fading clear coat. Inside, the interior requires a complete overhaul; the seats have multiple tears, and the carpet is heavily stained. Mechanically, the car starts but runs roughly, and the transmission needs immediate attention as it struggles to shift. This would be an ideal project car for someone looking for parts or a complete restoration, but it is not currently reliable for daily use.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be functional. The engine has a severe oil leak and an audible knocking sound, suggesting internal damage. The transmission slips between gears, and the suspension is worn out, leading to a very rough ride. On the exterior, there is significant rust on the body panels and the paint is peeling in several places. The interior has multiple tears in the upholstery and a persistent damp smell. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited for parts or as a major project for someone with mechanical expertise.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents, and the interior shows moderate wear. It is operational but will require some upcoming maintenance and minor repairs.

Step into excellence with this absolutely stunning vehicle! It is in pristine, showroom condition, looking and driving exactly like it did the day it left the lot. Meticulously cared for with no flaws to be found, this car represents the pinnacle of its model. If you're looking for perfection and a truly like-new experience, this is the one for you!

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver, offering a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it features a robust mechanical profile and a well-preserved interior. Each component has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for safety and operational excellence. This is an exceptional acquisition for those seeking executive-level quality and enduring value.

Hey there! 👋 I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty ride! It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in wonderful shape, running smooth and looking great. I’ve really looked after this car, so it’s ready to hit the road with you today. It's absolutely perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend adventures! I'd love for you to come by and take it for a spin—I think you're going to love how it drives!

Offered is a driver-focused 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera (996.2) featuring the 3.6L M96 flat-six engine with VarioCam Plus, delivering linear power through a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a multi-link rear suspension and well-damped MacPherson struts for precise turn-in. Braking is handled by factory four-piston monoblock calipers over cross-drilled rotors. This example presents in strong mechanical health with recent preventative maintenance performed on the IMS bearing and rear main seal, ensuring long-term reliability. While the exterior shows honest patina consistent with its mileage, the aerodynamic profile and structural integrity are uncompromised. A visceral, analog driving experience for the discerning enthusiast.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Maintenance records available. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, showing only minor, age-appropriate character marks that do not detract from its impressive curb appeal. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the high-quality upholstery is free of significant wear or tears, and the dashboard remains crack-free. Every electronic component, from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in robust health, having benefited from a strict adherence to its service schedule. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the suspension provides a quiet, composed ride. Recently fitted with a fresh set of tires and having passed a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this car is a turn-key solution for any driver seeking a dependable, high-performing vehicle that has clearly been cherished by its previous owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and refined performance. This unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our stringent standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. A premier choice for the discerning professional seeking a sophisticated driving experience at a competitive valuation.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been maintained to rigorous standards, ensuring a driving experience that remains both refined and dependable. Featuring a comprehensive service history and a clean profile, it represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning motorist who values quality and long-term reliability.

It drives super smoothly and has been kept up well. If you’re looking for a dependable vehicle that’s ready to hit the road today, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, complemented by clean lines and only minor signs of careful use. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free environment featuring well-preserved upholstery, intuitive controls, and a suite of fully operational electronics, including a premium audio system and dual-zone climate control. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a rigorous regular maintenance schedule. With recent service records, healthy tire tread, and a responsive transmission that shifts effortlessly, this car offers a confident and refined driving experience. It is a reliable, turn-key choice for any discerning driver looking for a quality pre-owned vehicle that has been treated with genuine care.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophisticated engineering. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this automobile delivers a refined driving experience and remains in commendable condition. It offers a sophisticated balance of luxury and long-term reliability for the discerning motorist.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me—perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that still looks great on the road! It runs smoothly and has been well-loved, so it's ready to hit the pavement with a new owner. Come check it out, you're going to love it!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a precise 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis maintains excellent torsional rigidity, benefited by documented subframe reinforcement and a factory limited-slip differential. Recent service includes a comprehensive VANOS system refresh and valve adjustment, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain operates at peak efficiency. While the exterior shows minor age-appropriate wear, the mechanical vitals remain robust, offering a pure analog driving experience with sharp turn-in and balanced weight distribution.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor cosmetic wear. Ready for sale.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between careful ownership and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with responsible use, while the alloy wheels remain free of major scuffs. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the leather seating has been regularly conditioned to prevent wear, and all electronic systems—from the intuitive infotainment display to the dual-zone climate control—operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine is responsive and the transmission shifts smoothly, a testament to its consistent maintenance schedule. It offers a quiet, composed ride that feels solid on the highway and agile in the city. If you are looking for a well-maintained, reliable performer that presents beautifully, this car is ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been really well-loved? This beauty is in great shape and absolutely ready for its next adventure! It runs super smoothly, looks fantastic, and I've taken excellent care of it over the years. It's perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend trips. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it feels on the road!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering linear power delivery up to its 8,400 RPM redline. Equipped with a lightning-fast M-DCT dual-clutch transmission and a variable M differential lock, the chassis remains composed through high-lateral-G corners thanks to the Electronic Damper Control (EDC). The vehicle maintains excellent mechanical integrity with recent rod bearing service and throttle actuator replacements already addressed. Used car in good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained engine. Interior shows minor wear. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained 2018 luxury SUV represents a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior is finished in a deep metallic charcoal that retains a high-gloss luster, showing only very minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with responsible ownership. Inside, the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any tears or stains, complemented by a smoke-free environment and pristine wood-grain accents. Every electronic feature, from the intuitive navigation system to the dual-zone climate control, operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is in excellent health, having undergone a recent comprehensive multi-point inspection. It features a complete service history, a smooth-shifting transmission, and a quiet, responsive engine. With a set of high-tread tires and fresh synthetic oil, this vehicle is truly turn-key and ready for its next owner to enjoy the refined driving experience it offers.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with enduring value. Thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and reliability, this offering stands as a testament to responsible ownership and exceptional care.
